query:
SELECT gameDate, COUNT(*) as total_games,
  SUM(CASE WHEN awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL OR homeBookSpread IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_vsin_odds,
  SUM(CASE WHEN awayTeam = 'tba' OR homeTeam = 'tba' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tba_games,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ncaaContestId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_contest_id
FROM games
WHERE gameDate BETWEEN '2026-03-04' AND '2026-03-10'
GROUP BY gameDate
ORDER BY gameDate;

SELECT gameDate, COUNT(*) as total_games,
  SUM(CASE WHEN awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL OR homeBookSpread IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_vsin_odds,
  SUM(CASE WHEN awayTeam = 'tba' OR homeTeam = 'tba' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tba_games,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ncaaContestId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_contest_id
FROM games
WHERE gameDate BETWEEN '2026-03-04' AND '2026-03-10'
GROUP BY gameDate
ORDER BY gameDate;
